pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in newer Jakarta EE versions; code importing javax.annotation.* will fail to compile or run if the runtime expects jakarta.annotation.*.
